name: Alert
purpose: Inline contextual banner for status, guidance, and warnings within a page region.

structures.name: Soft Alert
structures.notes: Tinted surface and matching icon; lives inline within content flow.

structures.name: Outline Alert
structures.notes: Border-led variant for quieter, denser surfaces.

structures.name: Alert with Action
structures.notes: Adds a trailing or inline action such as view details or dismiss.

contentExamples: Tushare 积分不足，已降级为免费数据源
interactionNotes: Distinct from Toast: Alert is persistent and inline, not transient.
Use tinted color-mix surfaces so banners stay readable without shouting.
